summary: Complete testing of Textile Production Module. All 20 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified for WIP, MP, and PT reports. Route conflict resolved - legacy /api/reportes/wip-legacy returns 404 as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reportes/wip?empresa_id=7 - returns 3 ordenes with estado_op, costo_mp, costo_servicio, costo_wip fields
Backend: GET /api/reportes/mp-valorizado?empresa_id=7 - returns 9 items with valor_total, total_reservado, costo_promedio fields
Backend: GET /api/reportes/pt-valorizado?empresa_id=7 - returns 2 items with valor_total, total_cierres, costo_promedio fields
Backend: GET /api/reportes/resumen-general?empresa_id=7 - returns mp_valor, wip_valor, pt_valor totals
Backend: GET /api/reportes/ordenes?empresa_id=7 - returns 5 ordenes with cost data
Backend: GET /api/reportes/wip-legacy - returns 404 (legacy removed as expected)
Backend: GET /api/rollos/disponibles/{item_id} - returns 3 active rollos with saldo > 0 for TELA-MULTI
Backend: POST /api/consumos - validates order state (rejects consumption on closed order)
Backend: POST /api/consumos/multi-rollo - endpoint exists and accepts valid input
Backend: GET /api/servicios-orden?empresa_id=7 - returns services with costo_total, estado fields
Backend: POST /api/servicios-orden - successfully creates service and updates WIP
Backend: GET /api/ordenes/{orden_id}/cierre/preview - returns cost preview with costo_mp, costo_servicios, costo_total
Backend: POST /api/ordenes/{orden_id}/cierre - validates PT required before closure
Backend: WIP total in ordenes matches resumen total
Backend: MP item values sum to valor_total_inventario
Frontend: Login works with eduard/eduard123
Frontend: WIP report shows N° Corte, Modelo, Estado, PT Asignado, Prendas, Costo MP, Costo Servicios, Total columns
Frontend: MP report shows Código, Nombre, Unidad, Stock, Reservado, Disponible, Costo Prom., Valor Stock columns
Frontend: PT report shows Código, Nombre, Stock, Costo Prom., Valor Stock, OPs Cerradas columns
Frontend: VALORIZACIÓN sidebar section shows MP Valorizado, WIP (En Proceso), PT Valorizado links
critical_code_review_comments: All report endpoints return correct field names (ordenes vs registros, estado_op, costo_servicio, costo_wip)
Frontend ReportesValorizacion.jsx correctly maps backend fields to UI columns
Route conflict resolved - reportes_val_router removed from server.py, legacy endpoint returns 404
FIFO cost calculation working correctly across consumo, rollos, and reports
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_produccion_textil.py - Created comprehensive test suite for production module
seed_data_creation: Test service was created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production module fully functional for empresa_id=7. WIP shows 3 orders (n_corte: 11, 10, 10) with Total WIP S/ 3,233.75. MP shows 9 items with Total S/ 6,215.00. PT shows 2 items (JEAN-T3, PANT-GABA) with Total S/ 4,294.10. Active orders for testing: 80a36f47 (n_corte=11), 00ad4198 (n_corte=10), b4d2080f (n_corte=10 with WIP S/ 3,233.75). Multi-rollo test item: TELA-MULTI id=6ab918f1 has 3 active rollos (R-GABA-001: 50m, R-GABA-002: 30m, R-GABA-003: 35m).

reports_api.wip: Returns ordenes with estado_op, costo_mp, costo_servicio, costo_wip
reports_api.mp_valorizado: Returns items with valor_total, total_reservado, costo_promedio
reports_api.pt_valorizado: Returns items with valor_total, total_cierres, costo_promedio
reports_api.ordenes: Returns all orders with cost data

rollos_api.disponibles: Returns active rollos with saldo > 0, includes costo_unitario_metro

consumo_api.simple: Validates order state, calculates FIFO cost
consumo_api.multi_rollo: Endpoint exists and accepts multiple rollos

servicios_api.crud: Full CRUD working, updates WIP correctly

cierre_api.preview: Returns cost breakdown, validates PT requirement
